name: Japanese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast sesame seeds on a cookie sheet in the oven; set aside.
2. In boiling water, cook noodles until tender (about 10 minutes), then drain and rinse. Let them dry.
3. Transfer cooked noodles to a large bowl. Add shrimp and green onions; mix well.
4. Mix together the olive oil and sesame oil. Heat about 2 tablespoons of this mixture in a pan.
5. Sauté mushrooms for 5 minutes. Add the sautéed mushrooms to the shrimp.
6. Blend in the soy sauce, sake, remaining sesame seeds, ginger, garlic, and any leftover oil. Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.
7. In a separate bowl, beat eggs and stir in seaweed.
8. Heat a skillet with oil, add about 1/4 of the egg mixture, and cook until it loosens from the pan. Turn over and place on a work surface. Make three more thin egg/seaweed pancakes.
9. Slice the pancakes into thin strips.
10. Toss the chilled noodles with the sliced pancakes.
11. Spoon and serve.
